name: claim_evidence_ratio
definition: Number of product claims with file/route/quote citations divided by total claims in the profile.
target_hint: ≥0.85 before downstream copy skills run. Below 0.7 = re-inspect README and landing routes.

name: icp_specificity_score
definition: Manual rubric 1–5: 5 = named role + stage + trigger + budget; 1 = generic persona label only.
target_hint: ≥4 for outbound-ready profiles. Score 2 triggers ICP rewrite.

name: competitive_wedge_clarity
definition: Percent of named competitors with a single-axis win statement (speed, price, workflow, compliance, etc.).
target_hint: 100% of listed competitors. Missing wedge blocks positioning decisions.

name: route_coverage
definition: Share of discovered public routes categorized (marketing, app, docs, auth, other).
target_hint: ≥80% categorized. Uncategorized routes may hide core value props.

name: pricing_signal_present
definition: Binary: pricing model documented from repo or explicitly flagged as gap.
target_hint: Must be true or gap flagged before paid ads or enterprise outreach tasks.
